requirement_topic.en: Lithium-Ion Cell and Battery Safety for Industrial Applications
requirement_topic.zh: 工业应用锂离子电芯与电池安全
requirement_topic.zht: 工業應用鋰離子電芯與電池安全

summary.en: EN IEC 62619:2022 sets safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries used in industrial applications, including BESS. It covers abuse testing, BMS requirements, and marking. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU requires harmonised standard compliance; EN IEC 62619 is referenced for EU conformity demonstrations. EN IEC 63056 applies to secondary lithium cells and batteries used in electrical energy storage systems.
summary.zh: EN IEC 62619:2022 规定了工业应用（含BESS）二次锂电芯与电池组安全要求，涵盖滥用测试、电池管理系统要求及标识。依据低电压指令2014/35/EU获取CE标志须符合相应协调标准；EN IEC 62619可用于欧盟符合性展示。EN IEC 63056适用于用于电气储能系统的二次锂电芯与电池。
summary.zht: EN IEC 62619:2022規定了工業應用（含BESS）二次鋰電芯與電池組的安全要求，涵蓋濫用測試、電池管理系統要求及標識。依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU取得CE標誌須符合對應協調標準，EN IEC 62619可用於歐盟符合性展示。EN IEC 63056適用於用於電氣儲能系統的二次鋰電芯與電池。

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 (recommended national standard) provides lithium-ion battery safety requirements for power energy storage and is commonly used for engineering references, while GB 44240-2024 is the strong compulsory safety regulation for energy-storage cells and batteries in China. Chinese grid or project approvals may still request GB/T evidence, but that alone is not a CE pathway for Malta.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023（推荐性标准）提供了电力储能用锂离子电芯与电池的安全要求，常作为工程参照；而GB 44240-2024是中国针对电能储能电芯和电池的强制性安全法规。中国电网或项目审核可能会要求GB/T材料，但这不足以构成马耳他（欧盟）CE合规路径。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023（推薦性標準）提供電力儲能用鋰離子電芯與電池之安全要求，常作為工程參照；而GB 44240-2024是中國針對電能儲能電芯及電池的強制安全法規。中國電網或項目審核可能會要求GB/T材料，但這不足以構成馬耳他（歐盟）CE合規路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — recommended national standard for energy-storage lithium-ion batteries
GB 44240-2024 — compulsory safety requirement for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage

gap.en: GB/T 36276 and GB 44240 test protocols differ from EN IEC 62619 in several technical details and cannot replace EU conformity evidence. Malta requires CE marking and an EU technical file under LVD; manufacturers need EU-recognised testing evidence and EU Declaration of Conformity before market access.
gap.zh: GB/T 36276和GB 44240与EN IEC 62619在多项技术细节上不同，不能替代欧盟所需符合性证据。马耳他要求依据LVD进行CE标志和技术文件提交，制造商需在欧盟认可实验室或欧盟流程下取得证据并提交欧盟符合性声明后方可入市。
gap.zht: GB/T 36276與GB 44240與EN IEC 62619在多項技術細節上不同，不能替代歐盟所需符合性證據。馬耳他要求依據LVD進行CE標誌和技術文件提交，製造商需在歐盟認可實驗室或歐盟程序下取得證據並提交歐盟符合性聲明後方可入市。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is required for placing BESS in Malta as part of the EU market.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for critical battery projects in China via relevant project review, while GB/T 36276 is recommended and GB 44240 provides the stronger compulsory line-item standard.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T/GB evidence does not by itself establish EU/LVD compliance in Malta. Separate evidence mapped to EN IEC 62619 and EN IEC 63056 with a proper EU Declaration of Conformity is typically required before project procurement and installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 单独依据GB/T/GB证据不足以证明马耳他的欧盟/低电压指令合规。通常需要按EN IEC 62619与EN IEC 63056建立映射并提交有效欧盟符合性声明后，方可进入项目采购与安装阶段。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 單獨依據GB/T／GB證據不足以證明馬耳他的歐盟/低電壓指令合規。通常需要按EN IEC 62619與EN IEC 63056建立映射並提交有效歐盟符合性聲明後，方可進入項目採購與安裝階段。

requirement_topic.en: Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Safety — System Level
requirement_topic.zh: 电池储能系统（BESS）整机安全
requirement_topic.zht: 電池儲能系統（BESS）整機安全

summary.en: EN IEC 62933-5-2:2020 defines BESS system-level safety requirements for risk assessment, prevention of thermal runaway propagation, emergency response, and installation safeguards. EN IEC 62040 covers related power conversion safety. Under EU law, LVD 2014/35/EU and EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 essential requirements are mandatory for market access; harmonised standards support technical evidence and conformity pathways.
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2020（电气储能系统——并网电气储能系统安全要求）定义了BESS系统级安全要求，包括风险评估、热失控蔓延防护、应急响应和安装安全。EN IEC 62040覆盖相关电力转换安全要求。欧盟法规层面，LVD 2014/35/EU与欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求是市场准入强制性要求，协调标准则用于技术证据与符合路径。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2020（電氣儲能系統——並網電氣儲能系統安全要求）定義了BESS系統級安全要求，包括風險評估、熱失控蔓延防護、應變應對及安裝安全。EN IEC 62040涵蓋相關電力轉換安全要求。歐盟法規層面，低電壓指令2014/35/EU與歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542之基本安全要求是市場准入強制性要求，協調標準則用於技術證據與符合路徑。

summary.en: GB/T 36558-2023 is the main China-referenced system-level standard for grid-connected storage in common project practice. It is a core technical reference for system requirements, but does not provide a full replacement for EU lifecycle and due-diligence obligations under the Battery Regulation framework.
summary.zh: GB/T 36558-2023是中国项目实践中并网储能系统级的主要技术基准。它在系统级技术要求上有重要参考价值，但无法完全替代欧盟《电池条例》框架下的生命周期与尽职调查义务。
summary.zht: GB/T 36558-2023是中國項目實務中並網儲能系統級的主要技術基準。它在系統級技術要求上有重要參考價值，但無法完全替代歐盟《電池法規》框架下之生命週期與盡職調查義務。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2023 — Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage

gap.en: EU-aligned system-level risk assessment, thermal runaway spread controls, and battery-passport-style lifecycle documentation are not fully mirrored by Chinese technical standards as used for routine export project files. Malta project teams often require explicit documentation trails for EN 62933-5-2 compliance and due-diligence packets under EU Battery Regulation.
gap.zh: 用于欧盟并网的系统级风险评估、热失控扩散控制以及类电池护照的生命周期文件链条，在中国常规出口项目文件中并不完全对应。马耳他项目团队通常要求提供与EN 62933-5-2一致的完整文件链，并提交欧盟电池法规框架下的尽职调查资料。
gap.zht: 用於歐盟並網的系統級風險評估、熱失控擴散控制以及類電池護照的生命週期文件鏈條，在中國慣行出口項目文件中並不完全對應。馬耳他項目團隊通常要求提供與EN 62933-5-2一致的完整文件鏈，並提交歐盟電池法規框架下的盡職調查資料。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EU essential safety obligations and battery due-diligence requirements are legally binding for market access in Malta; EN/IEC system standards support conformity proof rather than replace the legal obligations.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36558-2023 and related Chinese project standards are commonly mandatory in domestic grid-connection reviews but are not legally equivalent to Malta's EU-based mandatory obligations.

source.publisher: Regulator for Energy and Water Services (REWS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 36558-aligned evidence supports technical design but does not by itself establish Malta/EU market access. Manufacturers should complete EU-framed system safety and battery-regulation documentation, including due diligence and sustainability data, before site approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 36558体系证据可支持工程设计，但不足以单独构成马耳他/欧盟市场准入依据。制造商应在现场许可前补齐欧盟框架下的系统安全文件与电池法规定义务，包括尽职调查及可持续性数据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 36558體系證據可支持工程設計，但不足以單獨構成馬耳他／歐盟市場准入依據。製造商應在現場許可前補齊歐盟框架下的系統安全文件與電池法規義務，包括盡職調查及永續數據。

requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Directive — Electrical Safety for BESS Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 低电压指令——BESS设备电气安全
requirement_topic.zht: 低電壓指令——BESS設備電氣安全

summary.en: LVD 2014/35/EU requires electrical equipment in the 50–1000 V AC and 75–1500 V DC classes placed on the EU market to be safe and CE marked. For BESS this includes battery packs, inverters, switchgear, and enclosures. Manufacturers prepare a technical file, perform conformity assessment, and issue an EU Declaration of Conformity. Harmonic EN IEC 62619/63056 and EN IEC 62933-5-2 are used for conformity demonstrations.
summary.zh: 低电压指令2014/35/EU要求在欧盟市场销售的50–1000V AC或75–1500V DC范围内电气设备必须安全并加贴CE标志。对BESS而言，此范围覆盖电池组、逆变器、开关和外壳。制造商需准备技术文件、进行符合性评估并出具欧盟符合性声明，通常以EN IEC 62619/63056和EN IEC 62933-5-2作为欧盟符合性证明依据。
summary.zht: 低電壓指令2014/35/EU要求在歐盟市場銷售的50–1000V AC或75–1500V DC範圍內電氣設備必須安全並加貼CE標誌。對BESS而言，此範圍涵蓋電池組、逆變器、開關和外殼。製造商需準備技術文件、進行符合性評估並出具歐盟符合性聲明，通常以EN IEC 62619/63056和EN IEC 62933-5-2作為符合性證明依據。

summary.en: China does not operate a single national CE-like legal regime for all BESS electrical products. Relevant safety is governed through GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and project-operator review. Chinese compliance routes can be functionally stricter in some battery subtypes but do not generate an EU market access CE declaration.
summary.zh: 中国并无覆盖所有BESS电气产品的统一CE式法律体系。相关安全由GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023及项目运营方审核共同构成。中国合规路径在某些电池子类上更严格，但不等同于可在欧盟市场使用的CE声明体系。
summary.zht: 中國並無涵蓋所有BESS電氣產品的統一CE式法規體系。相關安全由GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023及項目運營方審核共同構成。中國合規路徑在某些電池子類上更嚴格，但不等同於可在歐盟市場使用的CE聲明體系。

gap.en: China’s approval model does not produce the product-level EU technical file and DoC required by Malta’s EU market role. Exporters need EU-conformity documentation, language/labeling updates, and often an EU authorised representative before putting BESS products into the Maltese market.
gap.zh: 中国的合规模式不产生马耳他所要求欧盟市场准入下的产品级技术文件与符合性声明。出口商通常需要补齐欧盟合规技术文件、说明书语言与标签更新，并在必要时指定欧盟授权代表。
gap.zht: 中國的合規模式不產生馬耳他作為歐盟市場角色所要求的產品級技術文件與符合性聲明。出口商通常需補齊歐盟符合性文件、說明書語言與標籤更新，並在必要時指定歐盟授權代表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — LVD 2014/35/EU is binding law for market access in Malta and the EU.
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent CE/LVD framework; safety is controlled through project/governance and grid operator review processes in China.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese NEA-grid or provincial review artifacts are not EU LVD compliance substitutes. CE process completion (technical file, risk assessment, DoC, and EU marking controls) is required before shipment or installation into Malta.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国国家能源局或地方审查文件不能替代欧盟LVD合规。向马耳他发运或安装前，需要完成CE流程（技术文件、风险评估、符合性声明与标记控制）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國國家能源局或地方審查文件不能替代歐盟LVD合規。向馬耳他發運或安裝前，需要完成CE流程（技術文件、風險評估、符合性聲明與標記控制）。
